title: Wild Women of Anatolia
overview: A collection of stories from five women across different regions, generations, and beliefs in Türkiye. A four-generation family harvesting nuts in the Black Sea region; Aslı running a historic coffee business in Istanbul; Hira giving birth in the Aegean Sea; Hatice, an Alevi/Kurdish woman on the eastern high plains; and Arya fighting for transgender rights in Ankara. Stories of freedom, desire, and dreams shaped by the landscapes they inhabit.
